name: Zendesk MCP Server
what_it_does: Zendesk MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Zendesk's customer service platform — managing support tickets, querying customer history, updating ticket statuses, creating macros, searching knowledge base articles, and automating customer support workflows.
use_cases: Querying and updating support tickets from customer service agents
Searching knowledge base articles from self-service automation agents
Managing ticket queues and assignments from support ops agents
Enriching customer context for support agents from CRM integration agents
Creating and triggering macros from automation agents
Generating support reports and SLA compliance summaries from analytics agents
not_for: Teams using Freshdesk, Intercom, or Help Scout as primary support platform
Non-support use cases (Zendesk is customer service focused)
best_when: An agent needs to read or write Zendesk support data for customer service automation, ticket management, or support analytics.
avoid_when: You're using Freshdesk, Intercom, or another customer support platform.

auth.notes: Zendesk API token (account-level) or OAuth 2.0 with scopes. API tokens use email/token Basic auth. OAuth preferred for user-facing apps with granular scopes.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Trial: 14-day free; no permanent free tier for support platform
pricing.paid_tiers: Suite Team: $55/agent/month; Suite Growth: $89; Suite Professional: $115; Enterprise: custom
pricing.notes: Agent-seat based pricing. API access included across all paid tiers. MCP server is community open source — not official Zendesk product.

performance.rate_limits: 700 req/min for most plans; higher for Enterprise

known_agent_gotchas: Subdomain required for all API calls — format: https://yourcompany.zendesk.com
API tokens use email:token as Basic auth — not standard Bearer token
Rate limits are per account, not per key — shared across all integrations
Ticket side conversations, custom fields, and forms vary by Zendesk configuration
Community MCP server — coverage may not include all Zendesk API endpoints
Some advanced features (AI features, workforce management) require specific plans
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Email/token Basic auth or OAuth 2.0. SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, GDPR. Community MCP server — review before production use. Data residency by region selection.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Email/token Basic auth or OAuth 2.0 with scopes. SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, GDPR. Community MCP server — audit before production.
